title: Imperial Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Imperial Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!
